title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India

jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Procter & Gamble India
jsonLd.description:
Procter & Gamble India has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Raipur office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Procter & Gamble India:
Procter & Gamble India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in 5S

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Referral bonus program
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Procter & Gamble India!
